## Summary

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests or docs checks run locally.
- [ ] Public docs/examples contain no secrets or private/operator data.
- [ ] README/status claims match implemented behavior.
- [ ] Future-facing or concept material is not described as current capability.
- [ ] Cell ledgers remain canonical truth; projections do not become hidden truth stores.
- [ ] Regulator or policy changes include focused tests.
- [ ] Schema or ledger changes include migration notes.
- [ ] Memory writes preserve provenance chain and review gates.
